Part.Source:
loadWWPContext.Call(&Context) If &Context.PesCod = 0 Return EndIf
&PesRaz = &Context.PesRaz For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod Where EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod Where FilCod = &Context.FilCod &FilFan = FilFan Exit EndFor
MB 4 MT 2
Header &titulo = 'PEDIDOS POR TRANSPORTADORA' print Cabecalho print filtro If &PedVenCod <> 0 print Vendedor EndIF End
if &LctAtuEst = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida &TituloDataFat = 'Saída' Else &TituloDataFat = 'Faturamento' EndIF
&PedidosEntradaSaida = 'PEDIDO: ' + upper(trim(&LctAtuEst.EnumerationDescription())) If &TipoRelatorio = 'A' //TRANSPORTADORAS DE SAIDA &tituloRedespacho = 'Redespacho'
Do Case CAse &OrdemExibicao = 'P' For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedSts, LctAtuEst, PedTraSaiCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where PedSts = Status_Pedido.FECHADO Where LctAtuEst = &LctAtuEst Where PedCod = &PedCod or &PedCod = 0 Where PedTraSaiCod = &TraPesCod or &TraPesCod = 0 Where PedDtaDsp >= &iniPedDtaDsp And PedDtaDsp <= &finPedDtaDsp Where PedDtaFat >= &iniPedDtaFat and PedDtaFat <= &finPedDtaFat Where PedDtaEmb >= &iniPedDtaEmb and PedDtaEmb <= &finPedDtaEmb Where PedCliCod = &PedCliCod or &PedCliCod = 0 Where PedVenCod = &PedVenCod or &PedVenCod = 0 Where LctTip <> TipoLancamento.MovimentacaoValores
&PedVenCodRaz = PedVenCodRaz
&PedTraSaiCodRaz = PedTraSaiCodRaz print Transportadora
print TituloPedidos &QtdPedidos = 0 &QtdVolumes = 0 &PedVlrLiq = 0 &QtdPeso = 0
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedSts, LctAtuEst, PedTraSaiCod, PedCod //Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedSts, LctAtuEst, PedTraSaiCod, PedCod
RetornaNotaPedido.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, PedTraRedCod, &LctAtuEst, &NfeNUm,&NfeQtdVol, &NfePesBrt)
&QtdPedidos += 1 if &NfeQtdVol > 0 &QtdVolumes += &NfeQtdVol &PedQtdVol = &NfeQtdVol Else &QtdVolumes += PedQtdVol &PedQtdVol = PedQtdVol EndIF
Do Case Case PedTipFrt = TipoFrete.SemFrete &AuxTipoFrete = 'S' Case PedTipFrt = TipoFrete.Terceiros &AuxTipoFrete = 'T' Case PedTipFrt = TipoFrete.Emitente &AuxTipoFrete = 'E' Case PedTipFrt = TipoFrete.Destinatario &AuxTipoFrete = 'D' EndCase
Do Case Case &NfePesBrt > 0 &PedPesTot = round(&NfePesBrt,3) Case PedPesTot > 0 &PedPesTot = round(PedPesTot,3) Otherwise &PedPesTot = round(PedPesTotPro,3) Endcase &QtdPeso += &PedPesTot
&PedVlrLiq += PedVlrLiq
&PedTraRedRaz = substr(PedTraRedRaz,1,12) &PesEntCidNom = Substr(PedCliEntCidNom,1,14)
if &LctAtuEst = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida &PedDtaDsp = PedDtaDsp Else &PedDtaDsp = PedDtaFat EndIf
print pedidos EndFor
Print TotalPedidosNovo
eject
EndFor
Case &OrdemExibicao = 'A' For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedSts, LctAtuEst, PedTraSaiCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where PedSts = Status_Pedido.FECHADO Where LctAtuEst = &LctAtuEst Where PedCod = &PedCod or &PedCod = 0 Where PedTraSaiCod = &TraPesCod or &TraPesCod = 0 Where PedDtaDsp >= &iniPedDtaDsp And PedDtaDsp <= &finPedDtaDsp Where PedDtaFat >= &iniPedDtaFat and PedDtaFat <= &finPedDtaFat Where PedDtaEmb >= &iniPedDtaEmb and PedDtaEmb <= &finPedDtaEmb Where PedCliCod = &PedCliCod or &PedCliCod = 0 Where PedVenCod = &PedVenCod or &PedVenCod = 0 Where LctTip <> TipoLancamento.MovimentacaoValores
&PedVenCodRaz = PedVenCodRaz
&PedTraSaiCodRaz = PedTraSaiCodRaz print Transportadora
print TituloPedidos &QtdPedidos = 0 &QtdVolumes = 0 &PedVlrLiq = 0 &QtdPeso = 0
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedSts, LctAtuEst, PedTraSaiCod, PedCliRaz
RetornaNotaPedido.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, PedTraRedCod, &LctAtuEst, &NfeNUm,&NfeQtdVol, &NfePesBrt)
&QtdPedidos += 1 if &NfeQtdVol > 0 &QtdVolumes += &NfeQtdVol &PedQtdVol = &NfeQtdVol Else &QtdVolumes += PedQtdVol &PedQtdVol = PedQtdVol EndIF
Do Case Case PedTipFrt = TipoFrete.SemFrete &AuxTipoFrete = 'S' Case PedTipFrt = TipoFrete.Terceiros &AuxTipoFrete = 'T' Case PedTipFrt = TipoFrete.Emitente &AuxTipoFrete = 'E' Case PedTipFrt = TipoFrete.Destinatario &AuxTipoFrete = 'D' EndCase
Do Case Case &NfePesBrt > 0 &PedPesTot = round(&NfePesBrt,3) Case PedPesTot > 0 &PedPesTot = round(PedPesTot,3) Otherwise &PedPesTot = round(PedPesTotPro,3) Endcase &QtdPeso += &PedPesTot
&PedVlrLiq += PedVlrLiq
&PedTraRedRaz = substr(PedTraRedRaz,1,12) &PesEntCidNom = Substr(PedCliEntCidNom,1,14)
if &LctAtuEst = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida &PedDtaDsp = PedDtaDsp Else &PedDtaDsp = PedDtaFat EndIf
print pedidos EndFor
Print TotalPedidosNovo
eject
EndFor
Case &OrdemExibicao = 'D' For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedSts, LctAtuEst, PedTraSaiCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where PedSts = Status_Pedido.FECHADO Where LctAtuEst = &LctAtuEst Where PedCod = &PedCod or &PedCod = 0 Where PedTraSaiCod = &TraPesCod or &TraPesCod = 0 Where PedDtaDsp >= &iniPedDtaDsp And PedDtaDsp <= &finPedDtaDsp Where PedDtaFat >= &iniPedDtaFat and PedDtaFat <= &finPedDtaFat Where PedDtaEmb >= &iniPedDtaEmb and PedDtaEmb <= &finPedDtaEmb Where PedCliCod = &PedCliCod or &PedCliCod = 0 Where PedVenCod = &PedVenCod or &PedVenCod = 0 Where LctTip <> TipoLancamento.MovimentacaoValores
&PedVenCodRaz = PedVenCodRaz
&PedTraSaiCodRaz = PedTraSaiCodRaz print Transportadora
print TituloPedidos &QtdPedidos = 0 &QtdVolumes = 0 &PedVlrLiq = 0 &QtdPeso = 0
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedSts, LctAtuEst, PedTraSaiCod, PedDtaDsp, PedDtaFat
RetornaNotaPedido.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, PedTraRedCod, &LctAtuEst, &NfeNUm,&NfeQtdVol, &NfePesBrt)
&QtdPedidos += 1 if &NfeQtdVol > 0 &QtdVolumes += &NfeQtdVol &PedQtdVol = &NfeQtdVol Else &QtdVolumes += PedQtdVol &PedQtdVol = PedQtdVol EndIF
Do Case Case PedTipFrt = TipoFrete.SemFrete &AuxTipoFrete = 'S' Case PedTipFrt = TipoFrete.Terceiros &AuxTipoFrete = 'T' Case PedTipFrt = TipoFrete.Emitente &AuxTipoFrete = 'E' Case PedTipFrt = TipoFrete.Destinatario &AuxTipoFrete = 'D' EndCase
Do Case Case &NfePesBrt > 0 &PedPesTot = round(&NfePesBrt,3) Case PedPesTot > 0 &PedPesTot = round(PedPesTot,3) Otherwise &PedPesTot = round(PedPesTotPro,3) Endcase &QtdPeso += &PedPesTot
&PedVlrLiq += PedVlrLiq
&PedTraRedRaz = substr(PedTraRedRaz,1,12) &PesEntCidNom = Substr(PedCliEntCidNom,1,14)
if &LctAtuEst = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida &PedDtaDsp = PedDtaDsp Else &PedDtaDsp = PedDtaFat EndIf
print pedidos EndFor
Print TotalPedidosNovo
eject
EndFor Endcase
Else //TRANSPORTADORA REDESPACHO &tituloRedespacho = 'Saída'
Do Case case &OrdemExibicao = 'P' For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedSts, LctAtuEst, PedTraRedCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where PedSts = Status_Pedido.FECHADO Where LctAtuEst = &LctAtuEst Where PedCod = &PedCod or &PedCod = 0 Where PedTraRedCod = &TraPesCod or &TraPesCod = 0 Where PedDtaDsp >= &iniPedDtaDsp And PedDtaDsp <= &finPedDtaDsp Where PedDtaFat >= &iniPedDtaFat and PedDtaFat <= &finPedDtaFat Where PedDtaEmb >= &iniPedDtaEmb and PedDtaEmb <= &finPedDtaEmb Where PedCliCod = &PedCliCod or &PedCliCod = 0 Where PedVenCod = &PedVenCod or &PedVenCod = 0 Where LctTip <> TipoLancamento.MovimentacaoValores
&PedVenCodRaz = PedVenCodRaz
&PedTraSaiCodRaz = PedTraRedCodRaz print Transportadora
print TituloPedidos &QtdPedidos = 0 &QtdVolumes = 0 &QtdPeso = 0 &PedVlrLiq = 0
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedSts, LctAtuEst, PedTraRedCod, PedCod
RetornaNotaPedido.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, PedTraRedCod, &LctAtuEst, &NfeNUm,&NfeQtdVol, &NfePesBrt)
&QtdPedidos += 1 if &NfeQtdVol > 0 &QtdVolumes += &NfeQtdVol &PedQtdVol = &NfeQtdVol Else &QtdVolumes += PedQtdVol &PedQtdVol = PedQtdVol EndIF
Do Case Case PedTipFrt = TipoFrete.SemFrete &AuxTipoFrete = 'S' Case PedTipFrt = TipoFrete.Terceiros &AuxTipoFrete = 'T' Case PedTipFrt = TipoFrete.Emitente &AuxTipoFrete = 'E' Case PedTipFrt = TipoFrete.Destinatario &AuxTipoFrete = 'D' EndCase
Do Case Case &NfePesBrt > 0 &PedPesTot = round(&NfePesBrt,3) Case PedPesTot > 0 &PedPesTot = round(PedPesTot,3) Otherwise &PedPesTot = round(PedPesTotPro,3) Endcase
&QtdPeso += &PedPesTot &PedVlrLiq += PedVlrLiq
&PedTraRedRaz = substr(PedTraSaiRaz,1,12) &PesEntCidNom = Substr(PedCliEntCidNom,1,14)
if &LctAtuEst = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida &PedDtaDsp = PedDtaDsp Else &PedDtaDsp = PedDtaFat EndIf
print pedidos EndFor
Print TotalPedidosNovo
eject
EndFor
case &OrdemExibicao = 'A' For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedSts, LctAtuEst, PedTraRedCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where PedSts = Status_Pedido.FECHADO Where LctAtuEst = &LctAtuEst Where PedCod = &PedCod or &PedCod = 0 Where PedTraRedCod = &TraPesCod or &TraPesCod = 0 Where PedDtaDsp >= &iniPedDtaDsp And PedDtaDsp <= &finPedDtaDsp Where PedDtaFat >= &iniPedDtaFat and PedDtaFat <= &finPedDtaFat Where PedDtaEmb >= &iniPedDtaEmb and PedDtaEmb <= &finPedDtaEmb Where PedCliCod = &PedCliCod or &PedCliCod = 0 Where PedVenCod = &PedVenCod or &PedVenCod = 0 Where LctTip <> TipoLancamento.MovimentacaoValores
&PedVenCodRaz = PedVenCodRaz
&PedTraSaiCodRaz = PedTraRedCodRaz print Transportadora
print TituloPedidos &QtdPedidos = 0 &QtdVolumes = 0 &QtdPeso = 0 &PedVlrLiq = 0
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedSts, LctAtuEst, PedTraRedCod, PedCliRaz
RetornaNotaPedido.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, PedTraRedCod, &LctAtuEst, &NfeNUm,&NfeQtdVol, &NfePesBrt)
&QtdPedidos += 1 if &NfeQtdVol > 0 &QtdVolumes += &NfeQtdVol &PedQtdVol = &NfeQtdVol Else &QtdVolumes += PedQtdVol &PedQtdVol = PedQtdVol EndIF
Do Case Case PedTipFrt = TipoFrete.SemFrete &AuxTipoFrete = 'S' Case PedTipFrt = TipoFrete.Terceiros &AuxTipoFrete = 'T' Case PedTipFrt = TipoFrete.Emitente &AuxTipoFrete = 'E' Case PedTipFrt = TipoFrete.Destinatario &AuxTipoFrete = 'D' EndCase
Do Case Case &NfePesBrt > 0 &PedPesTot = round(&NfePesBrt,3) Case PedPesTot > 0 &PedPesTot = round(PedPesTot,3) Otherwise &PedPesTot = round(PedPesTotPro,3) Endcase
&QtdPeso += &PedPesTot &PedVlrLiq += PedVlrLiq
&PedTraRedRaz = substr(PedTraSaiRaz,1,12) &PesEntCidNom = Substr(PedCliEntCidNom,1,14)
if &LctAtuEst = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida &PedDtaDsp = PedDtaDsp Else &PedDtaDsp = PedDtaFat EndIf
print pedidos EndFor
Print TotalPedidosNovo
eject
EndFor Case &OrdemExibicao = 'D' For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedSts, LctAtuEst, PedTraRedCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where PedSts = Status_Pedido.FECHADO Where LctAtuEst = &LctAtuEst Where PedCod = &PedCod or &PedCod = 0 Where PedTraRedCod = &TraPesCod or &TraPesCod = 0 Where PedDtaDsp >= &iniPedDtaDsp And PedDtaDsp <= &finPedDtaDsp Where PedDtaFat >= &iniPedDtaFat and PedDtaFat <= &finPedDtaFat Where PedDtaEmb >= &iniPedDtaEmb and PedDtaEmb <= &finPedDtaEmb Where PedCliCod = &PedCliCod or &PedCliCod = 0 Where PedVenCod = &PedVenCod or &PedVenCod = 0 Where LctTip <> TipoLancamento.MovimentacaoValores
&PedVenCodRaz = PedVenCodRaz
&PedTraSaiCodRaz = PedTraRedCodRaz print Transportadora
print TituloPedidos &QtdPedidos = 0 &QtdVolumes = 0 &QtdPeso = 0 &PedVlrLiq = 0
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedSts, LctAtuEst, PedTraRedCod, PedDtaDsp, PedDtaFat
RetornaNotaPedido.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, PedTraRedCod, &LctAtuEst, &NfeNUm,&NfeQtdVol, &NfePesBrt)
&QtdPedidos += 1 if &NfeQtdVol > 0 &QtdVolumes += &NfeQtdVol &PedQtdVol = &NfeQtdVol Else &QtdVolumes += PedQtdVol &PedQtdVol = PedQtdVol EndIF
Do Case Case PedTipFrt = TipoFrete.SemFrete &AuxTipoFrete = 'S' Case PedTipFrt = TipoFrete.Terceiros &AuxTipoFrete = 'T' Case PedTipFrt = TipoFrete.Emitente &AuxTipoFrete = 'E' Case PedTipFrt = TipoFrete.Destinatario &AuxTipoFrete = 'D' EndCase
Do Case Case &NfePesBrt > 0 &PedPesTot = round(&NfePesBrt,3) Case PedPesTot > 0 &PedPesTot = round(PedPesTot,3) Otherwise &PedPesTot = round(PedPesTotPro,3) Endcase
&QtdPeso += &PedPesTot &PedVlrLiq += PedVlrLiq
&PedTraRedRaz = substr(PedTraSaiRaz,1,12) &PesEntCidNom = Substr(PedCliEntCidNom,1,14)
if &LctAtuEst = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida &PedDtaDsp = PedDtaDsp Else &PedDtaDsp = PedDtaFat EndIf
print pedidos EndFor
Print TotalPedidosNovo
eject
EndFor EndCase
EndIf
Footer print Rodape End

Property.Name: RPT_TEXT
Property.Value: Respeite o meio ambiente. Evite a impressão deste documento!

Part.Source: parm(in:&EmpCod, in:&FilCod, in:&PedCliCod, in:&PedVenCod, &iniPedDtaEmb, &finPedDtaEmb, in:&iniPedDtaDsp, in:&finPedDtaDsp, in:&iniPedDtaFat, in:&finPedDtaFat, in:&TraPesCod, in:&TipoRelatorio, in:&LctAtuEst, in:&OrdemExibicao); output_file(&Pgmname, 'PDF');
